info.name: 🎬 Xoto OTT — Mobile App APIs
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Xoto OTT mobile app.

**Base URL variable:** `{{base_url}}` = `http://localhost:3000/api`
**Auth token variable:** `{{token}}` — set automatically after login/verify-otp

**How to use:**
1. Set `base_url` in Collection Variables
2. Run `Register` or `Send OTP → Verify OTP` to get a token
3. Token is saved to `{{token}}` automatically

302 Redirect to App/Store

- App deep link if app is installed: xoto://watch/64abc1234567890def012345
- Play Store / App Store if not installed
